snippet.description:
Tera Hone Laga Hoon Lyrical Video | Atif Aslam, Alisha Chinai | Ranbir Kapoor, Katrina Kaif | Pritam | Romantic Hindi Song

SONG CREDITS©

Song: Tera Hone Laga Hoon

Music Director: Pritam
Lyricist: Ashish Pandit
Movie: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
Starring: Ranbir Kapoor, Katrina Kaif
Music Label: Tips Official

Full Lyrics : 

Shining in the setting sun
Like a pearl upon the ocean
Come and heal me
Oh, heal me
Thinking about the love we're making
And the life we're living in

Ho…

Like a pearl upon the ocean
Come and heal me
Oh, heal me

And the life we're living in

Tera hone laga hoon
Khone laga hoon
Jab se mila hoon

Come and heal me

Thinking about the love we're making
And the life we're living in

Dil ne pukara hai haan ab to chali aao
Aankhon se chhu lu ke baahein tarasti hain
Dil ne pukara hai haan ab to chali aao

Aao ke main tumhein baahon mein bhar loon
Aao ke main tumhein tod ke hadh se
Apne mein shamil kar loon

Khone laga hoon
Jab se mila hoon

Har pal haseen hai, har lamha jannat hai
Jo main kahoon haan
Bas aaj se sunnat hai
Har pal haseen hai, har lamha jannat hai
Jo main kahoon haan
Bas aaj se sunnat hai

Hona tera hoon, main to hamesha hoon
Hona tera hoon, main to hamesha hoon

snippet.description:

par patiyon ki fitrat uske bhi bas mein nahi 😬

is baar apni Patni aur Woh Do ke saath! 😉

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Hindi Trailer | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
A legacy that built Swarajya. A story that shaped history. 🚩

Proudly presenting the trailer of Raja Shivaji.

Based on the life of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj - the Founder of Hindavi Swarajya.


Raja Shivaji in cinemas on 1st May 2026.
Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Written, Produced, Directed By: Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Produced By: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced By: Genelia Deshmukh
Music By: Ajay – Atul
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (ASC, ISC)
In Cinemas 1st May
A Jio Studios Release
 
Story Screenplay: Ajit Wadikar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue Writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi Dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production Designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Oak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
VFX Head of Production: Swapnil Khotkar
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Visual Promotion: Just Right Studioz NX
 
Jio Studios Team:
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production & Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Head – Marathi Content: Nikhil Sane
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu
 
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu
 
#RajaShivajiTrailer #RiteishDeshmukh #SanjayDutt, #AbhishekBachchan, #VidyaBalan, #SachinKhedekar, #Bhagyashree, #FardeenKhan, #JitendraJoshi, #AmoleGupte, #BomanIrani, #JyotiDeshpande, #GeneliaDeshmukh, #AjayAtul #RemoDsouza

snippet.title: UP WALI BIHAR WALI OFFICIAL TRAILER  I यू. पी. वाली बिहार वाली  I RANI CHATTERJEE I SANJANA PANDEY
snippet.description:
#ranichatterjee #sanjanapandey #prashantsingh #aloksingh #reenarani #upwalibiharwali #trending #bhojpuri #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuritrailer 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
फ़िल्म – यू . पी वाली बिहार वाली  (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – रानी  चटर्जी  संजना  पांडेय , प्रशांत  सिंह  , अलोक  सिंह  , रीना  रानी  , ललित  उपाध्याय , श्वेता वर्मा  प्रेम  दुबे
बाल कलाकार - स्वस्तिका
निर्देशक – मंजुल ठाकुर
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
लेखक   - अरबिंद तिवारी
गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी
छायांकन -  इमरान शगुन
संकलन - समीर शैख़ व जाहिद खान
कोरियोग्राफर – एम .के .गुप्ता (जॉय )
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - दास स्टूडियो (संजय दास )
प्रोडक्शन  कंट्रोलर  – रोशन  रॉय   
लोकल  प्रोडक्शन  –  मुकेश  दुबे  ,कमलेश  सिंह, दुष्यंत   सिंह   
आर्ट डायरेक्टर – राम दुलारे

निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, मंजुल ठाकुर
 म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC 
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी
B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 
मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय, विशाल यादव

B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे

ऑफिस बॉय – कन्हैया झा 

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट - फाइनेंस  -
 प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे , हिमांशु चौधरी 

B4U - फाइनेंस-
 संतोष  गर्ग  , रविंदर  साल्वी , रितेश  सिंह  , हर्षिल  शाह , शैलेश  त्रिवेदी  , प्रफुल  गैकवार्ड

FILM- UP WALI BIHAR WALI (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST- RANI CHATTERJEE , SANJANA PANDEY PRASHANT SINGH , ALOK SINGH , RINA RANI , LALIT UPADHYAY , SHWETA VERMA ,PREM DUBEY , 
CHILD ARTIST – SWASTIKA 
DIRECTOR- MANJUL THAKUR 
CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH
WRITER – ARBIND TIWARI   
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA 
LYRICS – ARBIND TIWARI

CINEMATOGRAPHER- IMRAN SHAGUN 
CHOREOGRAPHER- M.K GUPTA (JOY)
ART DIRECTOR- RAAM DULARE 
POST PRODUCTION – DAS STUDIO – (SANJAY DAS)
PRODUCTION CONTROLLER – ROSHAN RAY
LOCAL PRODUCTION – MUKESH DUBEY, KAMLESH SINGH, DUSHYANT SINGH  
PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH, MANJUL THAKUR
Music, satellite and digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI

B4U CREATIVE TEAM 
MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV 
B4U - LEGAL TEAM 
SANDEEP RANA , TRUSHNA PATEL , POONAM SHINDE , AKANKSHA WAKODE, MORE
OFFICE BOY - KANHAIYA JHA

IVY ENETERTAINMENT- FINANCE
PRADEEP K DAGA , JINELLE MASCARENHAS , VIPUL JAIN , NIVRUTTI PATIL , HIMANSHU CHAUDHARY


B4U – FINANCE TEAM
 SANTOSH GARG , RAVINDER SALVI, RITESH SINGH , HARSHIL SHAH, SHAILESH TRIVEDI , PRAFUL GAIKWARD

Yahi ho 2026 PUBG MOBILE National Championship South Asia Finals ko antim adhyay. Kati din samma bhayeko intense battles pachi, sabai kura Day 2 ma aayera thamncha, jaha Top 16 teams afno sabai shakti diyera euta matra lakshya ko lagi ladchan: South Asia ko champion banna.

Pratyek match, pratyek elimination, ra pratyek rotation le yo teams ko bhagya nirdharit garnecha. Yo bela second chance chaina – euta matra team sabai bhanda mathi uthnecha ra title claim garnecha.

Top 3 teams PMGO ma qualify hunechan.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael

VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda

VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan

snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.  

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don’t, it’s GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

Connect with #StreetFighterMovie online:
Website: https://www.streetfightermovie.com/ 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/streetfightermovie/
X: https://x.com/Street_fighter
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/StreetfighterMovie/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@streetfightermovie
Threads: https://www.threads.com/@streetfightermovie

Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

snippet.title: Teri Ore (Lyrical Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Love Song
snippet.description:
Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. 💫

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, don’t miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. 🎶

💬 Tell us in the comments — is this your favorite romantic Bollywood song?

Song - Teri Ore

Lyrics - Mayur Puri
Composer - Pritam
Director - Anees Bazmee
Producer - Vipul Amrutlal Shah

Teri Ore Lyrics:

Dil kho gaya ho gaya kisi ka,
abb raasta mil gaya khushi ka
Aankhon mein hai khaab sa kisi
ka, abb raasta mil gaya khushi ka
Rishta naya rabba, dil chhu raha hai
Kheenche mujhe koyi dor teri ore
(Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore haay rabba
Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore) - (2)

khulti fizayen khulti ghataye
sar pe naya hai aasmaan
Chaaro dishaaye haske bulaaye,
kyon sab huye hai meherbaan
Ha humane to yahi rabba
kasam se pata hai
Dil pe nahi koyi jor koyi jor
(Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore haay rabba
Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore) - (2)

Ek heer thi aur tha ek ranjha,
kehate hai mere gaanv mein
Saccha ho dil to sau muskilon
ho, jhukata naseeba pau main
Ho ho aanchal tera rabba
falak ban gaya hai
Aab iska nahi koyi oor koyi chhor
(Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore haay rabba
Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore) - (2)

abb raasta mil gaya khushi ka
Aankhon mein hai khaab sa kisi

hi.title: Teri Ore (Lyrical Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Love Song
hi.description:
'सिंह इज़ किंग' के प्रेम गीत 'तेरी ओर' के साथ प्यार के जादू को महसूस करें 💖✨

अत्यंत लोकप्रिय बॉलीवुड जोड़ी अक्षय कुमार और कैटरीना कैफ की इस रोमांटिक फिल्म में, जो अपनी बेमिसाल केमिस्ट्री के लिए जाने जाते हैं, प्यार का सार खूबसूरती से बयां किया गया है। राहत फतेह अली खान और श्रेया घोषाल द्वारा गाए गए और प्रीतम द्वारा संगीतबद्ध किए गए 'तेरी ओर' आज भी बॉलीवुड के सबसे प्रिय प्रेम गीतों में से एक है।

यह सदाबहार हिंदी रोमांटिक गीत अपनी मधुर धुन, दिल को छू लेने वाले बोल और अविस्मरणीय दृश्यों के लिए जाना जाता है। चाहे आप प्यार में हों या सिर्फ क्लासिकल बॉलीवुड संगीत के शौकीन हों, 'तेरी ओर' एक गहरा भावनात्मक जुड़ाव पैदा करता है जो हमेशा आपके साथ रहता है। 💫

अक्षय कुमार और कैटरीना कैफ की यह प्रतिष्ठित जोड़ी पूरे गाने में चमकती है। उनकी जादुई केमिस्ट्री का और आनंद लेने के लिए, 'वेलकम' के गानों के साथ-साथ 'सिंह इज़ किंग' के अन्य हिट गाने जैसे 'जी करदा', 'तल्ली हुआ' और 'भूतनी के' देखना न भूलें। 🎶

💬 हमें कमेंट्स में बताएं — क्या यह आपका पसंदीदा रोमांटिक बॉलीवुड गाना है?

de-DE.title: Teri Ore (Liedtext-Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Liebeslied
de-DE.description:
Spüre die Magie der Liebe mit „Teri Ore“, einem Liebeslied aus „Singh Is Kinng“ 💖✨

Mit dem unvergesslichen Bollywood-Traumpaar Akshay Kumar und Katrina Kaif, bekannt für ihre unglaubliche Leinwandchemie, fängt dieser romantische Song die Essenz der Liebe wunderschön ein. Gesungen von Rahat Fateh Ali Khan und Shreya Ghoshal, mit Musik von Pritam, zählt „Teri Ore“ zu den beliebtesten Bollywood-Liebesliedern.

Dieses zeitlose Hindi-Liebeslied ist bekannt für seine sanfte Melodie, die gefühlvollen Texte und die unvergesslichen Bilder. Ob verliebt oder einfach nur ein Fan klassischer Bollywood-Musik – „Teri Ore“ schafft eine tiefe emotionale Verbindung, die lange anhält. 💫

Das legendäre Paar Akshay Kumar und Katrina Kaif strahlt im gesamten Song. Um mehr von ihrer magischen Chemie zu erleben, solltest du dir auch die Songs aus „Welcome“ sowie weitere Hits aus „Singh Is Kinng“ wie „Jee Karda“, „Talli Hua“ und „Bhootni Ke“ anhören. 🎶

💬 Verratet uns in den Kommentaren: Ist das euer liebster romantischer Bollywood-Song?

Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. 💫

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, don’t miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. 🎶

id.title: Teri Ore (Video Lirik) | Singh Adalah Raja | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Lagu Cinta
id.description:
Rasakan keajaiban cinta dengan Teri Ore, lagu cinta dari film Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Dibintangi oleh pasangan Bollywood abadi Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif, yang dikenal karena chemistry luar biasa mereka di layar, lagu romantis ini dengan indah menangkap esensi cinta. Dinyanyikan oleh Rahat Fateh Ali Khan dan Shreya Ghoshal, dengan musik oleh Pritam, Teri Ore tetap menjadi salah satu lagu cinta Bollywood yang paling dicintai.

Lagu romantis Hindi abadi ini dikenal karena melodi yang menenangkan, lirik yang menyentuh hati, dan visual yang tak terlupakan. Baik Anda sedang jatuh cinta atau sekadar menikmati musik Bollywood klasik, Teri Ore menciptakan koneksi emosional yang dalam yang akan selalu Anda ingat. 💫

Pasangan ikonik Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif bersinar sepanjang lagu. Untuk menikmati lebih banyak chemistry magis mereka, jangan lewatkan lagu-lagu dari Welcome, bersama dengan lagu-lagu hits lainnya dari Singh Is Kinng seperti Jee Karda, Talli Hua, dan Bhootni Ke. 🎶

snippet.title: Bluesss & Friends - Yabi The Goat / Hidney Manchhe Ladchha / Episode 3
snippet.description:
Nepali Ghetto Intelligence By Bluesss
 
"Bluesss & Friends" is a creative platform born from Stargang, where Bluesss steps beyond the limits of commercial validation to create freely and authentically. It is a space where music meets character bringing together some of his favorite voices and personalities from the music and film world to build something timeless.

Nepali Ghetto Intelligence By Bluesss
 
"Bluesss & Friends" is a creative platform born from Stargang, where Bluesss steps beyond the limits of commercial validation to create freely and authentically. It is a space where music meets character bringing together some of his favorite voices and personalities from the music and film world to build something timeless.


Episode 003

“Hidney Maanchhe Ladchha” is a Nepali idiom that simply means “a person who walks, falls", signifying that failure is a natural part of the journey towards success. YABI immediately contrasts this idea, emphasizing that while falling is inevitable, he is bound to get back up and keep racing towards his dreams. Like the idiom, he didn’t just walk- he ran through the pitfalls his mom warned him about and these obstacles have shaped his journey and helped him to get to where he is now, “carrying the industry on his shoulders”.

Follow all of Bluesss and Friends Releases Here: https://bluesssandfriends.com

localized.title: Bluesss & Friends - Yabi The Goat / Hidney Manchhe Ladchha / Episode 3
localized.description:
Nepali Ghetto Intelligence By Bluesss
 
"Bluesss & Friends" is a creative platform born from Stargang, where Bluesss steps beyond the limits of commercial validation to create freely and authentically. It is a space where music meets character bringing together some of his favorite voices and personalities from the music and film world to build something timeless.

Nepali Ghetto Intelligence By Bluesss
 
"Bluesss & Friends" is a creative platform born from Stargang, where Bluesss steps beyond the limits of commercial validation to create freely and authentically. It is a space where music meets character bringing together some of his favorite voices and personalities from the music and film world to build something timeless.


Episode 003

“Hidney Maanchhe Ladchha” is a Nepali idiom that simply means “a person who walks, falls", signifying that failure is a natural part of the journey towards success. YABI immediately contrasts this idea, emphasizing that while falling is inevitable, he is bound to get back up and keep racing towards his dreams. Like the idiom, he didn’t just walk- he ran through the pitfalls his mom warned him about and these obstacles have shaped his journey and helped him to get to where he is now, “carrying the industry on his shoulders”.

Follow all of Bluesss and Friends Releases Here: https://bluesssandfriends.com

snippet.title: Bangles (Official #Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | बांगडी
snippet.description:
|| 🕉 || 
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

Singer - Sanju Rathod
Lyrics\Composer - Sanju Rathod
Music Produced By - G-Spark
Vocal Production & Mixed By - G-Spark
Additional Mix Mastered By - Rupendar Venkatesh @mixmagic Studios
Recorded by - Jagdish Bhandge at Apostrophe Studios

Director : Piyush - Shazia

Niyati Raval, Hemant Kumar , 
Prashant Acharya

snippet.title: Sapne Vs Everyone Season 2 - Official Trailer | Ambrish Verma, Paramvir Singh Cheema, Vijayant Kohli
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Sapne Vs Everyone Season 2 Official Trailer 
Starring Ambrish Verma, Paramvir Singh Cheema, Vijayant Kohli, Abhishek Chauhan, Nidhi Shah, Khushali Kumar, Naveen Kasturia, Vaishak Shankar
Directed by Ambrish Verma
Written by Ambrish Verma
Production Company: The Viral Fever

Official Release Date - May 1, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Two men chase their dreams in different worlds: Prashant battles Mumbai’s ruthless film industry to build his career, while Jimmy, a real estate salesman known as the “Sales God,” will stop at nothing to take revenge on his Mama as both question whether destiny is decided by fate or by those bold enough to take control of it.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

Welcome to the official stream of GG PMGO SCRIMS Grand Finals — where the best teams from across Asia battle it out for dominance!
Get ready for 4 days of intense action, clutch moments, and high-level gameplay as top-tier squads compete for glory 🏆

📅 Event Dates: 23, 24, 25 & 26 April
⏰ Time: 3:45PM 🇳🇵3:00PM 🇵🇰  4:00PM 🇧🇩
🎮 Format: 5 Matches Daily

🇵🇰 313 ESPORTS (313)

🇵🇰 7E ESPORTS (7E)
🇵🇰 RED SAINTS (RST)
🇧🇩 A1 RG ESPORTS (A1RG)
🇳🇵 HORAA ESPORTS (HORAA)
🇳🇵 DRS GAMING (DRS)
🇳🇵 T2K ESPORTS (T2K)

🇲🇳 CHAMPION ESPORTS (C1)
🇵🇰 RADICAL HUNTERS (RH)

🇧🇩 ZC GSM ESPORTS (GSM)
🇰🇷 OUTLAWZ (OUT)

snippet.description:
Disclaimer:
This music video contains artistic and emotional visuals intended solely for storytelling and musical expression.
There is no explicit content, nudity, or sexual activity.
All scenes comply with YouTube’s Community Guidelines and advertiser-friendly policies.


SXYBIT – One For The Night (Official Music Video)
One For The Night is a soft and emotional music video that captures a special late-night moment, a quiet connection, and the feeling of being close to someone, even if just for a night.
This visual story is crafted with clean cinematic shots, soft lighting, and smooth transitions, creating a calm and immersive atmosphere that beautifully blends with the night-time mood of the music.

The video focuses on gentle emotions, meaningful moments, and subtle storytelling, making it suitable for all audiences and fully compliant with YouTube’s Community Guidelines and monetization policies.

✨ Video Highlights:
 • Emotional & late-night storytelling
 • Clean cinematic visuals
 • Soft lighting and smooth transitions
 • Music-driven visual narrative
 • Calm, dreamy, and aesthetic mood

🎧 Best enjoyed with headphones.

snippet.title: KITAB (Official Music video) | Mr Dutt ft Vipin Foji | Tanu Rawat | New Haryanvi Song
snippet.description:
The internet has spoken and we have listened.  join Mr Dutt  for the Official Music Video of the viral hit song KITAB
MAKE YOUR REELS : https://url-shortener.me/I440


Listen on : 
Spotify : https://url-shortener.me/I43P



AUDIO CREDITS:
SONG : KITAB 
SINGER : MR DUTT FT VIPIN FOJI
LYRICS & COMPOSE : VARUN GARHWALA , MR DUTT
MUSIC & MISX MASTER : MR DUTT

 FEMALE LEAD : TANU RAWAT 
REEL PROMOTIONS: SHARP MEDIA

YT Promotion - BIGMedia 

Director - Teji Sandhu
Cheif Ad - Sourav Dheer
1st Ad - Jass
Editor - cutsbynav
Colorist - Fateh Sidhu
Vfx - Gags 3D
Female lead - Tanu Rawat
Production Head = Kainth Production (Gagan)
Production ad = Ravi Birla
Himachal production- Sunny 
Makeup = Komal Makeover
Hair = Sunny Lakhanpal
Still = J singh
Spot Team - Ram and Team

Tanu Rawat Team 
Anjali Rawat and Team

Transport - Nijjar Group
Art - Karma 
Costume - Rajat Manchanda
Costume Ad - Neha and Fahem

lyrics : 
Tane Mai Likhu Rani Dil Ki 
Ya Tane Mumtaj Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai beth Gya Tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Re Hottha Na Gulab Likh Diyu 
Re Akhya Ne Sharab Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga
Chunni Mai Jo Moti Jadre Usne Chhori Tara Likhu 
Chand Fika Lagge Se Yo Rup Kitna Pyara Lilkhu 
Ram Ka ishara Likhu Dekhya Na Nazara Likhhu Bat Chhoti Lage Meri Kaat Ke dubara Likkhu 
Re Battan Ne Alap Likhunga 
Jo dikhja Tu Khaab Likhunga 
Je likhne Mai Beth Gya tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 

Ho Pucche na Tu Mere Te Ya Ashiq ka Haal Resham Te Jyada Hai Sunehre Tere Baal 
Ho Pariya Ke desh Te Tu Aayi Vissa Dalke 
Red Moon Jisi E Tu lage Se Kamal 
Can’t lu Without You You Baby Mine 
If You Touch Me So am Feeling Fine 
Likhu Tere Bare Saari Duniya Ke Bol Laau 
Likhu Tere Bare Sari Duniya Ne Bhul Jau 
Likkhu Tere Bare fir Kuch Or Na Mai Likh Pau 
Tod ke Kalam Fir Fanshi Pe Mai Jhul Jaau 

Tanne Mai Meri Radha Likh Diyu 
Maine Mai Ghanshyam Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To Pkka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Tanne Mai likhhu Rani Dil ki


#kitab #mrdutt

Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

O cruel one, O Zaalima..

snippet.description:
Aagyat Presents: New Nepali Dj Dancing Song

#manaimanma #nepalisong #nepalimusic #nepalidancingsong #nepalidjremixsong #nepalidj #nepalidjsong #nepalifilmsong #officialsong #nepalilokgeet #nepaliviralsong #nepaligeet #newtrendingsong

#NepaliCouple #DJRemix #MusicVideo #OfficialMusicVideo
#NepalMusic #TrendingNow #DanceSong #himalayanvibes 
#newsong
--------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:

Manai manma…
Manai manma…

Ya ta tuna layeu ki…
Ya ta manko chabi choryeu timile…

Manai manma… manai manma…
Timile mero mutu choyau chupchap
Manai manma… manai manma…
Maya basyo… thahai nabhai

Manai manma socheko kurani
Jhattai thaha pauchau ho kasari
Bhana timile… bhana timile
Ya ta tuna layau ki
Ya ta manko chabi choryeu timile

Hey… Hey…
Hands up…
Manai manma…

Manai manma… manai manma…
Body move gara… side to side
Manai manma… manai manma…

Uff furti her
Lau her furti her
Timi jasto hajarau pachi chan
Furti nadekhau
Timile furti nadekhau
Nakkale ketale maya nabolau

Timi najik huda mutu dhadkincha
Malai pani kina yesto lagcha
Shayad yo nai maya ho…

Manai manma… manai manma…
Manai manma… manai manma…
Move your body nonstop
Ya ta tuna layau ki
Ya ta manko chabi choryau timile

Manai manma…
Manai manma…
🎶 Audio Credits:

Aagyat

♬ Lyrics:

Ramesh Luitel

China - Gate (1998) : Chamma Chamma Baaje Re | Alka Yagnik | Shankar Mahadevan | Vinod Rathod 


Song Credits:
Song: Chamma Chamma Baaje Re 
Movie: China - Gate (1998) 
Singer(s): Alka Yagnik, Shankar Mahadevan, Vinod Rathod
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Rajkumar Santoshi
Director: Rajkumar Santoshi
Cast: Om Puri, Danny Denzongpa, Amrish Puri

Song Lyrics:

Dekha Dekhee Dil Meraa Jud Gaya Re
Leke Pardesi Dil Ud Gaya Re
Dekha Dekhee Dil Meraa Jud Gaya Re
Leke Pardesi Dil Ud Gaya Re

Chhamma Chhamma Ae Chhamma Chhamma
Chhamma Chhamma Baje Re Meree Paejaniya
Chhamma Chhamma Baje Re Meree Paejaniya

Tere Pas Aau Teree Sanson Me Samau Raja
Teree Ninde Churalu

Teree Ninde Churalu

Dekha Dekhee Dil Meraa Jud Gaya Re
Leke Pardesi Dil Ud Gaya Re

Dila Du Bangala Dila Du GadiDivani Sath Toh Aa
Dila Du Bangala Dila Du Gadi Divani Sath Toh Aa
Meree Balee Hai Umar Mujhe Lagta Hai Dar
Meree Balee Hai Umar Mujhe Lagta Hai Dar
Naa Kar Beimanee

Leke Pardesi Dil Ud Gaya Re

Meree Patalee Kamar Meree Tirchhi Najar
Meree Chadhti Jawanee

snippet.title: तू इस तरह से मेरी ज़िन्दगी में | Aap To Aise Na The | Mohammed Rafi Songs | Om Shivpuri
snippet.description:
मोहम्मद रफ़ी साहब, एक ऐसी आवाज़ जो आज भी हमारे दिलों में बसी है। उनकी आवाज़ में एक दर्द है, एक प्यार है, जो सीधे दिल को छू जाता है। 80 के दशक के उनके रोमांटिक गाने आज भी हर प्यार करने वाले की पसंद हैं। 'तू इस तरह से मेरी ज़िन्दगी में' एक ऐसा ही नगमा है, जो प्यार की गहराई को बयां करता है। रफ़ी साहब के गाये इस गाने में प्यार की मासूमियत, विरह की पीड़ा और मिलन की आस छुपी हुई है। यह गाना हमें उस दौर में ले जाता है जब प्यार इज़हार करने के लिए शब्दों की ज़रूरत नहीं होती थी, बस आँखों ही आँखों में सब कुछ कह दिया जाता था।


Credits :

Song: Tu Is Tarah Se Mere Zindagi Main
Album: Aap To Aise Na The
Artist: Mohammed Rafi
Music Director: Usha Khanna
Lyricist: Nida Fazli 


ऐसे ही और भी कई गाने हैं रफ़ी साहब के, जो आज भी हमें सुकून देते हैं और प्यार की याद दिलाते हैं। उनकी आवाज़ में एक जादू है, जो हमें हमेशा के लिए उनका दीवाना बना देता है। आइए, इस खूबसूरत गाने को सुनें और रफ़ी साहब की आवाज़ के जादू में खो जाएं।

अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया हो, तो इसे लाइक करें, कमेंट में अपना पसंदीदा गाना बताएं और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

Let the magic of music live on…

snippet.title: Måneskin - Beggin' (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Måneskin - Beggin' (Lyrics)
Get:

Lyrics:

[Måneskin]
Put your loving hand out, baby
'Cause I'm beggin'

[Måneskin]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out darlin'

[Måneskin]
Ridin' high, when I was king
I played it hard and fast, 'cause I had everything
I walked away, you want me then
But easy come and easy go
And it would end

So, any time I need ya, let me go
Yah, any time I feed you, get me? No
Any time I see you, let me know
But I planted that seed, just let me grow
I'm on my knees while I'm beggin'
'Cause I don't want to lose you
Hey yeah, ratatata

[Måneskin]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
And put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
And put your loving hand out darlin'

[Måneskin]
I need you to understand
Tried so hard to be your man
The kind of man you want in the end
Only then can I begin to live again

An empty shell
I used to be
The shadow of my life
Was hangin over me
A broken man
But I don't know
Won't even stand the devil's dance
To win my soul

[Måneskin]
What we doin'? What we chasin'?
What about 'em, why the basement?
Why we got good shit, don't embrace it?
Why the feel for the need to replace me?
You on a runway track from the good
I want to paint in the pictures any way we could, react
Like the heart in a trash where you should
You done gave it away, ya' had it till you took it back
But I keep walkin' on
Keep rockin' dawns
Keep walking forward
Now the court is yours
Keep browsin' halls
'Cause I don't wanna live in a broken home
Girl I'm beggin'

[Måneskin]
Mhh ye-e-e-ah
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out darlin'

[Måneskin]
I'm fightin' hard
To hold my own
Just can't make it all alone
I'm holdin' on
I can't fall back
I'm just a con about to fade to black

[Måneskin]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
Put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out darlin'

I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out darlin'

[Måneskin]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out

Tags:
Måneskin Beggin' Lyrics,
Måneskin Beggin',
Beggin' Lyrics,
Beggin',
I'm beggin' beggin' you,
Put your loving hand out baby,
So put your loving hand out darlin’,
So any time I need ya let me go,
Yah any time I feed you get me? No,
Any time I see you let me know,
But I planted that seed just let me grow,
I'm on my knees while I'm beggin’,
'Cause I don't want to lose you,
Hey yeah ratatata

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Bairan - Banjaare

✖ Stream / Download:
https://open.spotify.com/album/3ZIsrV7xUXWX4tR0vk1CGF

✖ Follow Banjaare:
https://instagram.com/official_banjaare

🎤  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarе ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mеin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

snippet.title: French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee
snippet.description:
French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee: Song from Coachella 2026

Check Out the Coachella 2026 Rap/Hip-Hop, R&B Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg2x_V0qn2yoXAThIirv3AHI_R5Ngazct

⭐Follow Afterglow:
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/davcev/?hl=en
Spotify: https://www.instagram.com/davcev/?hl=en
🔴 Picture : https://lexica.art/ 

⭐French Montana:
https://www.instagram.com/frenchmontana/

Lyrics:

[Pre-Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
It's not gonna work for you
Nobody can equal me (I know)
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm fucked up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peeped you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A fucking good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink, but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

[Verse 1: French Montana]
Feelin' like I'm fresh out, Boosie (Boosie)
If they want the drama, got the Uzi (Uzi)
Ship the whole crew to the cruise ship (Cruise)
Doin' shit you don't even see in movies (Movies)
Ride with me, ride with me, boss (Boss)
I got a hard head, but her ass soft (Soft)
She want the last name with the ring on it
'Cause I pulled out a million cash, told her plank on it (Skrrt)

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi (Ow)

[Pre-Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm fucked up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peeped you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A fucking good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink, but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do (Oh)
[Verse 2: French Montana]
You ain't enough for me
Too much for you, alone
Baby, go and grab some bad bitches, bring 'em home
Know the jet's on me
I'ma curve my best for you, you know
So pick up that dress for me
Leave the rest on
Too much convo for 24 hours
When you stand next to me, 24 karats
She left her man at home
She don't love him no more
I want your mind and your body
Don't mind nobody
So, you don't ever hurt nobody
Baby girl, work your body, work your body

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose (Ooh)
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi
Why not?

[Outro: Swae Lee]
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

Contact: afterglow.musicrecord@gmail.com
_________________________________________________
French Montana, Swae Lee - Unforgettable
Released 07/04/2017
From the album "Now That’s What I Call Music 2018"

Song: Saajan Saajan
Movie: Dil Ka Rishta 
Singer(s) : Alka Yagnik, Kumar Sanu, Sapna Awasthi

Lyricist : Sameer

Maine Maana Ke Pyaar Ki Had Hoti Hai 
Haan Maine Maana Ke Intezar Ki Had Hoti Hai

Maine Maana Ke Ikraar Ki Had Hoti Hai

O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan

Kitne Deewanee Ho Gayi Main Kuch Samajh Na Aaya 
Ishq Mein Jab Jee Ghabraaya Dooriyan Dil Seh Nahin Paya

O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan

O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
Ishq Mein Jeena Hai Ishq Mein Marna Hai
Ishq Bina Ab To Kuch Nahin Karna Hai
Duniya Waalo Se Ab Nahin Darna Hai
Mere Dil Ki Har Dhadkan Mein Ishq Samaya
Ishq Mein Jab Jee Ghabraaya Dooriyan Dil Seh Nahin Paya
Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan

Ishq Nahin Aasaan Ishq Bada Mushkil
Ishq Ke Raahi Ko Milti Nahi Manzil
Ishq Mein Kuch Bhi To Hota Nahin Haasil
Ishq Hai Kya Is Ishq Ko Koyi Samajh Na Paya
Ishq Mein Jab Jee Ghabraaya Dooriyan Dil Seh Nahin Paya
Kitne Deewanee Ho Gayi Main Kuch Samajh Na Aaya
(Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan

Like, have you ever been to Japan?

I’ve been dropping hints all night

And then maybe we could make-makeout
Clothes off and fall to the ground
Let’s go steady

And tell the whole damn world how

You’re looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles
The most alive I’ve ever been
But kiss me and I might

Pisces and a Gemini
But I think we might go really nice together
If you let me stay the night
Well I think I might just have to stay forever

यूट्यूब: https://www.youtube.com/chateauversailles
फेसबुक: https://www.facebook.com/chateauversailles

गीत के बोल

मुझे पता है कि बार 11 बजे बंद हो जाता है
मुझे उम्मीद है कि तुम वो बियर कभी खत्म नहीं करोगी
तुम्हें "जस्ट लाइक हेवन" के सारे बोल याद हैं
और मुझे पता है कि उसने ये क्यों लिखे
अब जब तुम यहीं खड़ी हो

ओह
एक रात मैं बिस्तर पर बोर हो रही थी
और मैंने तुम्हें इंटरनेट पर ढूंढा
ये स्त्री की सहज बुद्धि है
क्योंकि मैंने हमेशा हम दोनों को ऐसे खड़े देखा था
बाथरूम की लाइन में एक-दूसरे से सटकर
तुम दीवारों पर किसी फरिश्ते जैसी लग रही हो वर्साय
मैं इतनी ज़िंदादिल कभी नहीं रही
पर मुझे चूम लो तो शायद मैं मर ही जाऊँगी

और मुझे उल्टी आने जैसा लग रहा है
बाएँ हुक, दाएँ मुक्का पेट पर
तुम बहुत ही प्यारे लड़के हो
मुझे डर है कि मैंने तुम्हें सिर्फ़ कल्पना में ही देखा है
हाँ, मुझे बहुत अच्छा लगेगा अगर तुम मुझे घर तक छोड़ दो
अगर तुम वादा करो कि हम धीरे-धीरे चलेंगे
क्योंकि मेरे पास च्युइंग गम है
और बहुत सी बातें हैं जो मैं जानना चाहती हूँ
जैसे, क्या तुम कभी जापान गए हो?

या यूरोस्टार से फ़्रांस गए हो?

मैं पूरी रात इशारे करती रही
कि अगर तुम मेरा हाथ पकड़ लो तो मुझे कितना अच्छा लगेगा, धिक्कार है!
और फिर शायद हम किस कर लें
कपड़े उतारकर ज़मीन पर गिर पड़ें
चलो रिश्ता पक्का करते हैं
चलो बाहर चलते हैं
और पूरी दुनिया को बताते हैं कैसे

एक रात मैं बिस्तर पर ऊब गई थी
और इंटरनेट पर तुम्हारा पीछा किया
यह स्त्री की सहज बुद्धि है
क्योंकि मैंने हमेशा हम दोनों को ऐसे खड़े देखा है
बाथरूम की लाइन में एक-दूसरे से चिपके हुए
तुम वर्साय की दीवारों पर किसी देवदूत की तरह लग रहे हो
मैं इतनी ज़िंदादिल कभी नहीं रही
लेकिन मुझे किस करो और शायद मैं

snippet.description:
MEY STUDIO PRESENTS "LOOP मा"
Loop Maa a new Nepali song by Ujan Shakya after Baby.

Written, Music Produced & Performed by : UJAN SHAKYA

MAIN CAST
UJAN SHAKYA 
LOOMILA JOSHI

SPECIAL APPEARANCES 
MANOJ MAHARJAN
PREEZOL NEPALI
ARPAN TAMANG

snippet.title: श्यामा आन बसों वृन्दावन मे | Shyama Aan Baso Vrindavan Mein | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
श्यामा आन बसों वृन्दावन मे | Shyama Aan Baso Vrindavan Mein | Official Music Video | Sanatan Music

Feel the sweetness of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition of “Shyama Aan Baso Vrindavan Mein” — a heartfelt bhajan calling Shri Krishna (Shyama) to reside within our heart, our home, and our life with divine grace.

This devotional bhajan is perfect for morning puja, meditation, evening aarti, satsang, or quiet moments of reflection. Let the name of Shyama fill your mind with calmness and your heart with devotion.

✨ Why listen to this bhajan:
• Brings peace, positivity, and Vrindavan bhakti vibes
• Ideal for meditation, naam-jap, and daily spiritual routine
• Helps reduce stress, anxiety, and overthinking through devotion
• Creates a soothing devotional atmosphere at home

🎧 Close your eyes and imagine Vrindavan — where every breath feels like a prayer and every moment feels close to Radha-Krishna.
🙏 If this bhajan touched your soul, please like, share, and subscribe to Sanatan Music for more devotional music and peaceful mantras.

🎥 VISUALS & POST-PRODUCTION
The visual experience in this video has been significantly edited, color-graded, and animated by our post-production team to enhance your meditative immersion.

snippet.title: Rama | Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 🏹
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Adapted for Screenplay by Shridhar Raghavan & Nitesh Tiwari.
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari

Music by Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Kumar Vishwas

VFX by DNEG (8-time Academy Award winner)

Filmed for IMAX

Presented by Prime Focus Studios in association with Monster Mind Creations

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

snippet.title: Kaavish - Intezaar
snippet.description:
Artist : Kaavish
Song : Intezaar

MUSIC
Lyrics : Jaffer Zaidi 
Bass : Waleed Attique

VIDEO
Director & Editor : Imam
Producer : Ovais Suhail 
Cinematographer : Babar Dahr
Art Director: Yamina Peerzada 
Focus Puller : Shakeel Shaukat 
Camera : Kap Camera Rental 
Lights & Crew : Popa Lights
Production Assistants : Muhammad Latif, Muhammad Aamir

Production Management : Alena Peerzada 
Artist management : Adil Awan

Lyrics:

تیرے انتظار میں
آشِیاں سجاؤں گا
ہوگا یہ مِلن کبھی
خود کو یہ بتاؤں گا

تیرے ہی وِصال سے
دل سکون پائے گا

درد انتظار کا
کیا، کِسے بتاؤں گا

ہو کے تیرے رُوبرو 
حالِ دل سناؤں گا

تب تلک یہ دل تیری
یاد میں ہی گائے گا

تیرے انتظار میں 

بے وجہ سے جیون میں
جینے کی وجہ تو ہے
سُونے سُونے آنگن میں
پیار کی ہَوا تو ہے
تیرے بِنا 
مر جاؤں نہ میں

تیرے انتظار میں 

یہ آگ یوں جَلتی رہے
یہ دل میرا، مجھ سے یہ کہے
کہ میں جَل جاؤں، پاؤں 
پیار، جو ہو نہ فنا

میں جَل جاؤں، پاؤں 
پیار، جو ہو نہ فنا

snippet.title: Arijit Singh - Zaalima | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Love Song
snippet.description:
Song - Zaalima
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

snippet.title: Naino Ne Baandhi - Akshay Kumar  | Gold | Mouni Roy | Yasser Desai | Arko | Full Video
snippet.description:
When words fail, let the eyes do the talking.

Official video song ‘Naino Ne Baandhi’ from the movie Gold, a heart touching melody that will pluck the strings of your heart in the voice of the melodious Arko and Yasser Desai.

Song - Naino Ne Baandhi - Arko ft Yasser Desai
Movie - Gold
Vocals - Yasser Desai
Music and Lyrics - Arko


Gold is a historical sports drama inspired by India’s first Olympic gold medal. The film traces the “golden era” of Indian hockey through the journey of Tapan Das, a young assistant manager in 1936, who dreams of playing for an independent nation.

F - सुघर शरीर के सजावट बलम देखी शरीर के बनावट बलम

काला साड़ी के कहबू त 
क देब दुकान हम पटने में 
F - पहिर लेनी काटन बलम जी 
करी ना उद्घाटन बलम जी 
M आशु प्रियांशु कुर्ती सिलेला ए जान

snippet.title: Sia - Cheap Thrills ft. Sean Paul 🌟 (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Cheap Thrills by Sia featuring Sean Paul is an upbeat anthem about having fun without needing money or luxury. 🎶💃 The song celebrates dancing, freedom, and enjoying the moment with friends. Its catchy rhythm and joyful energy make it all about good vibes and living in the now. 🌟🕺

🔔 Turn on notifications to find out about upcoming videos!

⏬ Digital Platforms:
🚀"Sia - Cheap Thrills ft. Sean Paul": https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/track/2ONIJ40u0Attbm3miIIpNO

📸Follow Sia:
▶ YouTube: @sia 
▶ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/siamusic/?hl=es-la
▶ Twitter: https://x.com/Sia
▶ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/siamusic/?locale=es_LA
▶ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@sia

📸Follow Octava:
▶Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fededlyrics/
🎵 Follow the official Octava playlist on Spotify: https://spti.fi/octava

──────────────────────────────

🎤Lyrics: Sia - Cheap Thrills ft. Sean Paul

[Intro: Sean Paul]
Up with it girl
Rock with it girl
Show dem it girl (Bada bang bang)
Bounce with it girl
Dance with it girl
Get with it girl (Bada bang bang)

[Verse 1: Sia]
Come on, come on, turn the radio on
It's Friday night and I won't be long
Gotta do my hair, I put my make up on
It's Friday night and I won't be long

[Pre-Chorus: Sia (Sean Paul)]
Till I hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
Hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
I got all I need
No, I ain't got cash, I ain't got cash
But I got you baby
(Just you an me)

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Verse 2: Sia]
Come on, come on, turn the radio on
It's Saturday and I won't be long
Gotta paint my nails, put my high heels on
It's Saturday and I won't be long

[Pre-Chorus: Sia (Sean Paul)]
Till I hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
Hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
I got all I need (Sia)
No, I ain't got cash, I ain't got cash
But I got you baby
(Just you an me)

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Verse 3: Sean Paul & (Sia)]
Me an you, girl, you an me
Drop it to di floor an mek mi see your energy because
Mi nah play nuh hide an seek
Wah fi see di ting you have weg mek me feel weak girl (Free)
'Cause anytime you wine an kotch it
Di selector pull it up an put it pon repeat, girl
I'm nah touch a dollar in mi pocket
'Cause nuttn' in this world ain't more dan what you worth (I love cheap thrills!)

[Bridge: Sia & Sean Paul]
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control
Oh, oh

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Outro: Sia]
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)

Touch my body tender

Kicking off the covers

How can we go back to being friends
When we just shared a bed?
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?

[Verse 2]
It was last December
You were layin' on my chest
I still remember
I was scared to take a breath
Didn't want you to movе your head

[Chorus]

When we just shared a bed? (Yeah)

I'm someone you've never met?

The devil in your eyes
Won't deny the lies you've sold
I'm holding on too tight
While you let go
This is casual

How can we go back to being friends
When we just shared a bed? (Yeah)
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?
How can we go back to being friends
When we just shared a bed? (Yeah)
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?

[Outro]
I'm someone you've never met (Yeah)

snippet.title: Powfu - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics) ft. beabadoobee
snippet.description:
Powfu, beabadoobee - death bed (coffee for your head)
STREAM & DOWNLOAD:

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📌 Similar vibes & playlists:
► Late Night Pop & Electronic Lyrics → https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlHNBTZe9-dvCN99ICQzArXFZ4z58Sh0C
► New Emotional Pop & Electronic (2026) →https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlHNBTZe9-dsDJ0iwECLZpVikUXp58bXd

🎧 [LYRICS]:
Don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

Yeah...
I don't wanna fall asleep, I don't wanna pass away
I been thinking of our future cause I'll never see those days
I don't know why this has happened, but I probably deserve it
I tried to do my best, but you know that I'm not perfect
I been praying for forgiveness, you been praying for my health
When I leave this earth, hoping you'll find someone else
Cause yeah, we still young there's so much we haven't done
Getting married, start a family, watch your husband with his son
I wish it could be me, but I won't make it off this bed
I hope I go to heaven, so I see you once again
My life was kinda short, but I got so many blessings
Happy you were mine, it sucks that it's all ending

Don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

And I, don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

I'm happy that you're here with me, I'm sorry if I tear up
When me and you were younger you would always make me cheer up
Taking goofy videos while walking through the park
You would jump into my arms every time you heard a bark
Cuddle in your sheets, sang me sound asleep
And sneak out through your kitchen at exactly 1:03
Sundays went to church, on Mondays watched a movie
Soon you'll be alone, sorry that you have to lose me

Don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

And I, don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

Don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

And I, don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

And I, don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

TAGS:
#Powfu #deathbed #lyrics 

🖤 Become a part of our Family, Subscribe!

snippet.title: New Bhojpuri Song | Khesari Lal New Song Roti Garam | Namrita Malla | Shilpi Raj | Bhojpuri Gana
snippet.description:
“रोटी गरम” में खेसारी लाल यादव, नम्रिता मल्ला और शिल्पी राज का धमाका छा गइल बा, फुल मस्ती और डांस के साथ अभी देखीं 🚀

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Audio Credits:
Singers: Khesari Lal Yadav & Shilpi Raj
Music Director: Ajay Singh AJ
Lyrics: Abhishek Babu Yadav (ABY)
Additional Vocal - Vipul Pandey , Gangesh Raja , Ajay Singh Aj

Video Credits:
Featuring: Khesari Lal Yadav & Namrita Malla
Video Design & Directed: Sooraj Katoch
DOP: Rahul Yadav
Choreographer: Shoki & Lokesh
Video Edit: Srikanth (ZAV Studio)
AD: Geeta Tamta (Zenith)
Costumes: Reema Katoch (Zai Fashions)
Dancers: Zenith Dance Troupe
Production: Rohit Seth (Zenith)
Associate: Alex
Asst.: Prince Yadav
Focus Puller: Anish
Makeup: Aryan Rajesh
Hair: Sonu
BTS: Chetan, Pujan (ZAV Studio)
Colourist: Govindpuria

Lyrics: 

कोरस:-
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली 
 म्यूजिक ...
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली शर्मीली रंगीली नशीली कटीली छबीली आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल 
हे हे हे ...

Chorus :-
 खुल के बतावअ गोरी कुछ ना छुपावअ गोरी 
सईया ने का का छुवा     ......आ
करअ तारु चोरा चोरी कइसे भइल जोरा जोरी
रतिया में का का हुआ .......    आ

Mukhda: - 
Male  :-
पहिला राती के बतिया बतावअ
बाटे किरिया तु कुछ ना छुपावअ -२

female -
होठवा के होठवा से देहिया के देहिया से 
रुई जैसा नरम किया 
सईया  मोरा सईया मोरा सईया 
नाही सरम किया  
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया 
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया

Male: -
निर्दईया  निर्दईया निर्दईया तोहार बावे  पिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया ..

Female :-
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया ..


Antra: -1
chorus: -
धक धक का धक धक का धक धक जिया करे
जब आके मौका पाके उ कोरा भरे ...

Male: -
कइसे के नैना चार भइल 
कइसे शुरु राते प्यार भइल
कांचे कसइली रहल बदनिया 
कइसे फुला के अनार भइल

Female: -
अँखिया से अँखिया लड़ल रहे 
दिल में बेचैनी बढ़ल रहे 
चुम्मा लेवे में हाय रामा ढाढी गढ़ल रहे  -२
बलमा मोरा बलमा मोरा बलमा बेशरम पिया
जला के जोबन पे ...

Antra: -2
Chorus: -
क ख ग घ पढ़लू ह का 
नाईट फलाइट पे चढ़लू ह का 

Male: -
धीरे धीरे कइसे सीन भइल 
मामला कब रंगीन भइल 
रसगुल्ला जइसन मीठ मीठ  देहिया
कइसे ए  गोरी नमकीन भइल 

Female  :-
कनवा के बाली टूट गईल
होठवा के लाली छुट गईल
फुलवा के डाली पाके भवरा लूट गईल -२
(हम अनाड़ी )
उई मा उई मा उई मा नाही मरम दिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा...

#rotigaram
#khesarilalyadav 
#namritamalla 
#shilpiraj 
#mungda 
#newbhojpurisong 
#newbhojpurigana 

Learn to sing in Sur with AI Powered Personal Music Teacher- Padhanisa by Saregama. Download Padhanisa App now; https://sarega.ma/padhanisa

Follow us on:
Facebook: https://bit.ly/3FxwPgo 
Instagram: https://bit.ly/32rkJqM
X: https://x.com/saregamaglobal

Label:: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

bn.title: এফসি মোবাইলে আমার প্রথম TOTS প্যাক ওপেনিং!
bn.description:
প্রিমিয়ার লিগের TOTS আনুষ্ঠানিকভাবে এসে গেছে! আমি একটা বাজে দল দিয়ে শুরু করেছিলাম, কিন্তু ২১০টি ড্রাফট ভাউচার ব্যবহার করে একটি ১১৮ OVR-এর দুর্দান্ত স্কোয়াড তৈরি করছি। আমরা কি ১২০ OVR ব্রুনো ফার্নান্দেস TOTS অথবা ১১৯ OVR জর্জ বেস্ট TOTS আইকনটি প্যাক করতে পারব?

আমার লক্ষ্য:

- একটি ১১৮ OVR দল তৈরি করা
- ৫ জন ১১৮+ OVR প্লেয়ার প্যাক করা
- ১২০ OVR ব্রুনো ফার্নান্দেসকে প্যাক করা

দর্শকদের লক্ষ্য:
- ২০,০০০ লাইক! 📈
- ৫,০০০ নতুন সাবস্ক্রাইবার! 🍀
- ৫০০ কমেন্ট! 💬

দেখা যাক আজ কে জেতে, আমি নাকি RkGang!

📩 ব্যবসায়িক অনুসন্ধানের জন্য → rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com

📺 আমার অন্যান্য চ্যানেলগুলো দেখুন:
🎮 প্রধান এফসি মোবাইল চ্যানেল → https://www.youtube.com/@RkReddy
⚽ প্লেয়ার ও ক্লাব-ভিত্তিক এফসি মোবাইল কন্টেন্ট → https://www.youtube.com/@rkreddy2.0
📽️ এফসি ২৬ ক্যারিয়ার মোড ভিডিও → https://www.youtube.com/@rkreddyplus

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Kasari | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi mayalus,
This is the last video we've planned to release from GhaamChhaya Intimate. I hope you liked what we did and we plan on doing more of these soon. We'll be releasing music videos from the album following this. 

This is me and the band performing “Kasari”  

Stream GhaamChhaya on all streaming platforms now 

Keys / Vocals — Yabesh Thapa
Female BV — Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar — John Tamang
Drums — Stifler
Bass — Av Kc
Electric Guitar — Roshan Lama
Sarangi — Kiran Maharjan
Flute — Shrijan Maharjan
Cello — Iva Maharjan
Violin — Pheobe Shrestha
Audio Engineer — Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Mastered — Kobid Bazra

Special thanks to Ruslan Studio and Jade Studio for supporting us.

Stay connected:
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

snippet.title: 6th NEC-Road to Asian Games 2026- PUBG Mobile Grand Finals | Day 2 |
snippet.description:
Day 2 raises the stakes as teams fight to climb the leaderboard and secure their position. With pressure building and strategies evolving, every match becomes more intense and unpredictable.

📅 Match Time: 12:00 PM onwards

🔥 Expect clutch plays, aggressive rotations, and high-risk decisions as teams push for the top.

💥 The leaderboard starts taking shape—who will dominate today?
